reviews.comment:
Muy bien ubicada pero con accesos chicos para los que cargan combustible teniendo tanto lugar se podría destinar algo para no tener que esperar en la calle en temporada. Con la atención excelente de su gente y la calidad de los productos de YPF de siempre.

(Translated by Google)
Very well located, but the access is narrow for those refueling. With so much space, they could allocate some space to avoid long waits on the street during peak season. Excellent service from the staff and the same high-quality YPF products as always.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPeGJtYzhRRRAB
